title: About Me
description: Theoretical physicist working at the intersection of quantum control, quantum computing, and machine learning. PhD candidate at Radboud University, Nijmegen.

services.title: Quantum Control & Feedback
services.description: Design and analysis of feedback protocols for open quantum systems: path-integral quantum control (PiQC), stochastic optimal control, and measurement-based state preparation.

services.title: Stochastic Quantum Dynamics
services.description: Lindblad master equations, quantum trajectories, continuous measurement theory, and geometric interpretations of measurement backaction via double-bracket flows.

services.title: Quantum Computing Theory
services.description: Algorithms and control strategies for quantum annealing and near-term hardware, including decoherence analysis, noise cancellation, and complexity bounds.

services.title: Scientific Software
services.description: Production-level tools for reduced-order modeling (arby) and quantum control (PiQC) in Python and MATLAB, plus ML frameworks (PyTorch, Keras) for quantum applications.
